name: Product Requirements Document

metadata.description: Defines product vision, user needs, functional capabilities, and success criteria derived from the Business Requirements Document.

sections.title: Product Overview
sections.purpose: Provide a high-level overview of the product and how it addresses the business objectives.

sections.title: Product Vision
sections.purpose: Describe the long-term vision and positioning of the product.

sections.title: Target Users and Personas
sections.purpose: Identify the primary user groups and describe their characteristics and needs.

sections.title: User Problems / Pain Points
sections.purpose: Describe the key problems faced by users that the product intends to solve.

sections.title: Product Goals
sections.purpose: Define measurable product-level goals aligned with business objectives.

sections.title: Product Features
sections.purpose: Provide a structured list of product capabilities required to address the user problems.

sections.title: User Journeys
sections.purpose: Describe end-to-end workflows showing how users interact with the product.

sections.title: Minimum Viable Product (MVP) Scope
sections.purpose: Define the set of features included in the initial release.

sections.title: Functional Overview
sections.purpose: Provide a high-level overview of system behavior without implementation details.

sections.title: Non Goals
sections.purpose: Clarify which capabilities or features are explicitly excluded.

sections.title: Assumptions
sections.purpose: List assumptions made during product definition.

sections.title: Success Metrics
sections.purpose: Define KPIs and product metrics that determine success.

sections.title: Dependencies
sections.purpose: List dependencies on external systems, teams, or third parties.

sections.title: High Level Acceptance Criteria
sections.purpose: Define conditions that determine whether the product features meet expectations.

sections.title: Approval and Sign Off
sections.purpose: Capture formal approval of the product requirements.

validationRules: Every feature must trace back to at least one user problem.
Product goals must align with business objectives defined in the BRD.
MVP scope must be a subset of the defined features.
Acceptance criteria must correspond to defined product features.

promptHints.systemIntent: Generate a structured product requirements document translating business goals into product capabilities.
rules: Do not invent personas, metrics, or stakeholders not supported by inputs.
Ensure each feature addresses a defined user problem.
Ensure product goals align with business objectives.
